title: Shapeshifter Origin
description: The shapeshifter can change between four different forms: standard, speed, attack, defense, and three different sizes: small, average, and large, all with unique benefits and drawbacks.
body:
# Overview
- Idea/suggested by `.visage.` on discord
## Actives
### Form shift
- Cycle between four different forms.
- Standard form: No buffs or debuffs
- Attack form: gains +50% attack damage and reach, at the cost of 2 hearts
- Speed form: gains +50 movement speed and an elytra, but you have 5 less hearts
- Defense form: take 50% less knockback and damage, and gain 2 extra hearts, but you're 30% slower
- 5 seconds cooldown (shared with size shift)
### Size shift
- Cycle between three different sizes
- Small: One block tall, +50% movement speed and 1 less heart
- Average: No debuffs or buffs
- Large: Become 3 blocks tall gains 3 extra hearts
- 5 seconds cooldown (shared with form shift)
## Passives: 
### Inadequate
- Your inexperience with your alternate forms prevents you from swimming outside of standard form.
### Ludicrous appetite
- Due to your flexible constitution, you become hungry much more quickly.
### Ironphobia
- Having most iron-based items in your inventory or touching iron blocks will burn you
- Iron tools and weapons also deal double damage when used on you
- You take twice the fire damage
# Final notes
- Join the discord to suggest features, ports, report bugs, or request the source code.
